title: anatherum scoparium
intro: Anatherum scoparium, also known as Indian rice grass or pineland blue grama, is a type of perennial grass native to the United States, particularly in the southwestern regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting healing. Anatherum scoparium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
